mapper.select: select id, exam_id, student_id, answer_status, switch_count, create_time, update_time, deleted from exam_student where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId}

select es.exam_id, es.student_id, u.student_no, u.real_name as student_name, c.class_name, c.grade_name, es.answer_status, es.switch_count, es.update_time as start_time from exam_student es join sys_user u on u.id = es.student_id and u.deleted = 0 left join class_info c on c.id = u.class_id and c.deleted = 0 where es.deleted = 0 and es.exam_id = #{examId} and es.answer_status in ('ANSWERING', 'SUBMITTED', 'WAIT_MARKING', 'MARKED') order by case when es.answer_status = 'ANSWERING' then 0 else 1 end, es.switch_count desc, es.update_time asc
mapper.insert:
insert into exam_student(exam_id, student_id, answer_status, switch_count, create_time, update_time, deleted) values
(#{item.examId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.answerStatus}, #{item.switchCount}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted})
